channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fire hydrant cover raised serious trip hazard, 5th May
item.description:
Raised fire hydrant cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadway, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress outside Old School House, 5th May
item.description:
This flytipped mattress appeared over the weekend and has now been there for several days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The no entry signs have been painted over, 5th May
item.description:
The no entry signs have been painted over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds and stinging nettles on Footpath 19 needs urgent attention, 5th May
item.description:
Footpath 19 is really overgrown with weeds and stinging nettles which is causing access issues and needs urgent attention and clearing ASAP...this has been reported and couple of times now and reports say that the problem has been fixed which is hasnt...please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crusoe Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty street, 5th May
item.description:
Chatsworth rd is really dirty. Now we have a market on Sunday serving food the road needs to be washed before the market and all of dustbins to be emptied when full. I’ve seen used condoms rotting food etc and it’s not conducive to eating food hygenically

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flitip, 5th May
item.description:
Once again, someone park the car outside First farm Wetlands social media First farm it’s so sad Perhaps cameras temporary are required

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Firs Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging onto road which is blocking view when reversing off driveway., 5th May
item.description:
Blocking view of traffic when reversing off drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside nightingale surgery, 5th May
item.description:
Furniture been dumped outside nightingale surgery. This is an NHS surgery and this is not acceptable.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spearman Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 5th May
item.description:
Bins along the path of the green between Bastion Road & Rutherglen Road need urgent emptying. For some reason RBG have removed the bins for dog waste, therefore, dog owners are having to use litter bins. There are 3 bins along this path, all overflowing, litter on path & grass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ripped bin bags, 5th May
item.description:
As title

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree sideshoots obstructing roadway and footpath, 5th May
item.description:
This tree was planted some years ago and has never been pruned. It has extensive overgrowth. It is obstructing pavement and roadway. Also base suffocated with large weeds over 1 metre tall which are invasive. Please would someone maintain the tree and surrounding area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Burlington Rise, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bags of rubbish including food waste left on street which has been attacked by animals, 5th May
item.description:
The bags have been left - containing food waste - overnight and they have been attacked by animals (foxes etc) leaving the waste over the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fremont Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox to ge collected 35 Prince Rupert Road SE9 1LR, 5th May
item.description:
Hi I would like to report a dead fox at 35 prince rupert Road Eltham, SE9 1LR. It has been triple bagged up by myself and placed on top of their green bin in the front garden. It is my neighbour’s garden but house is going through Probate and there is no one at the house, I have bagged up the fox for collection.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince Rupert Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sinkhole forming, 5th May
item.description:
There is a hole forming after crossing as you travel toward Charlton Village, I'm reporting before it becomes a bigger issue
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household Rubbish, 5th May
item.description:
A bin bag has been sitting outside 42 Felbridge housefor over a week. It was never disposed of and resulted of attracting rodents/Fox last night that went through the bag spilling the rubbish all over the floor. This s unsanitary

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Quorn Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - old appliances, 5th May
item.description:
Yet again more fly tipping at this location (an almost daily occurrence!!). Please pick up this rubbish, including an old printer. Please also install “no fly tipping” signed and cctv cameras to deter this anti social behaviour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bushberry Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 5th May
item.description:
Please can the waste team remove a brown bin outside number 14 on Speldhurst road. a horrific smell has been coming from this bin. the whole thing needs to be removed and carefully dealt with/ disinfected. The contents could be dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Speldhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a leak on the pavement, 5th May
item.description:
Water leak is getting worse everyday. It has been like this for several months and now there is moss and mold growing on this water

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement of Algernon Road outside 9/10 (other side from recent report), 5th May
item.description:
Unswept litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Algernon Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Algernon Road opposite number 9/10, 5th May
item.description:
Unswept street.
